# Employee Management System - Java

## 📌 Project Overview

Employee Management System is a Java Console-Based Application developed using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) concepts and HashMap Collection Framework.

The application allows users to perform CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations on employee records through a menu-driven interface.

---

## 🚀 Features

* Add New Employee
* View All Employees
* Search Employee by ID
* Update Employee Salary
* Delete Employee by ID
* Input Validation
* Auto-generated Employee IDs
* Menu-Driven Console Application

---

## 🛠 Technologies Used

* Java
* OOP Concepts
* HashMap Collection
* Eclipse IDE
* Git & GitHub

---

## 📂 Project Structure

EmployeeManagementSystem

├── Employee.java

└── Main.java

## 🧠 Concepts Implemented

### Object-Oriented Programming (OOP)

* Classes and Objects
* Constructors
* Encapsulation
* Getters and Setters
* Method Overriding
* toString() Method

### Collections Framework

* HashMap
* put()
* get()
* remove()
* containsKey()
* values()

### Java Fundamentals

* Loops
* Conditional Statements
* Methods
* User Input using Scanner
* Validation Logic
